name_en: 🔥🔥🔥【Original leather with 🌈 full counter packaging】🔥🔥Intro: The Jackie 1961 series, inspired by 'Aria - Fashion Aria', is re-launched with a soft-textured, structured rectangular tote bag. The series features the iconic gold-tone push-lock hardware. Sparkling crystal rhinestones!!️ paired with noble lizard skin🦎 are a perfect match! The hollow-out design adds even more fashion sense~Material!!️ Uses counter-quality crystal rhinestones and imported lizard skin, matching hardware with precise polishing👏Clear texture, delicate quality, the highest quality!
